name: Jeremy Thamert
bio: Jeremy leads MH Construction with mission-level discipline, relationship-first leadership, and more than three decades of construction experience. A U.S. Army aviation veteran and seasoned operator, he aligns field execution, client communication, and long-term strategy so every project is delivered with accountability, precision, and trust. Public records and independent reporting document his background across military aviation, renewable-energy entrepreneurship, code-compliance credentials, and regional construction leadership.
careerHighlights: Leads company-wide mission alignment from client kickoff through final closeout.
Built and scaled multiple businesses with disciplined operational systems.
Maintains leadership visibility through verified public records, independent stories, and community participation.
Guides strategic growth while protecting MH relationship-first standards.
Mentors leaders to strengthen accountability, communication, and execution.
funFact: Jeremy is most energized when aligning people, safety, and execution around one clear mission.
certifications: Leadership Development, Safety Management, Procore Certified Admin, Oregon code-inspection and plans-examiner record identifiers
